data.description: ROK: National Assembly plenary passes 'Three Laws for Exchange Rate Stability'... Benefits for returning 'Western learning ants'

data.title: LIFT Commences 2026 Environmental Baseline Data Collection Program at the Yellowknife Lithium Project
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 31, 2026, Li-FT Power Ltd. (LIFT), listed under TSXV: LIFT, OTCQX: LIFFF, and Frankfurt: WS0, has launched the 2026 Environmental Baseline Data Collection Program for the Yellowknife Lithium Project. This program marks the next phase of environmental studies and will focus on the Big-Nite pegmatite cluster. The expansion will cover a wider geographic area and support project planning and future permitting activities, including Environmental Assessment.

data.title: GLOBAL POWER SOLUTIONS LAUNCHES DECENTRALIZED POWER DEVELOPMENT INITIATIVE ACROSS NORTH AMERICA
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Global Power Solutions Corp. (TSXV: PWER) (FSE: NJA) revealed the initiation of its Decentralized Power Development Initiative in Vancouver, British Columbia. This initiative, aiming at assessing prospects for installing modular hydrogen-based energy systems, will primarily target deployment opportunities in North America.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) aims for $1.50 by April 2026, currently trading at $1.25. A breakout above $1.31 resistance may be key.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently priced at $1.25 and is experiencing an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI), indicating a potential rebound. Technical analysis indicates that if DOT surpasses the resistance level of $1.31, it could potentially reach a target of $1.50.

data.title: Allshares Acquires Technology Company Amalia to Accelerate Innovation in Ownership and Incentive Management
data.description: Allshares, a worldwide equity and ownership management platform, has confirmed the purchase of Amalia, a firm from France that focuses on sales commission and performance management software. This acquisition bolsters Allshares' platform by incorporating a sophisticated, rules-based engine from Amalia, enriching its comprehensive ownership services. Amalia, established in 2020, prioritizes technology in its operations. Their software revolves around a robust rules engine that facilitates intuitive decision-making processes.

data.title: Schneider Electric Joins Thread Group Board of Directors
data.description: Schneider Electric, a member of the Thread Group since 2015, has now joined the Board of Directors of the industry alliance based in SAN RAMON, Calif. This move is significant as it signifies Schneider Electric's commitment to playing a more influential role in shaping the future of the Thread wireless networking protocol. The Thread Group focuses on IoT convergence, security, power, and architecture challenges. This development is crucial for the organization as Thread has recently exceeded 1000 consumer members, marking a pivotal moment.

data.title: Palliser Capital Publishes Value Enhancement Plan for Ajinomoto
data.description: In London, Palliser Capital, a major shareholder of Ajinomoto Co., Inc., released a presentation discussing strategies to enhance long-term value at Ajinomoto. The presentation, titled “Maximising the Value of Ajinomoto – The Most Under-Monetised AI Infras,” aims to increase transparency and address the rising interest from stakeholders. Palliser is among the top 25 shareholders of Ajinomoto and believes in the potential to unlock significant value for the company.

data.title: BlackRock Retains Top Spot in the U.S. 2026 Broadridge Fund Brand 50 Report
data.description: In the United States, fund selectors prioritize three key attributes when collaborating with asset managers: "Solidity," "Client-focused mindset," and "Attractive investment strategy." A recent report by Broadridge reveals these as the top qualities sought by fund selectors. The annual research study, Fund Brand 50 (FB50), conducted in New York, highlighted the importance of these factors for successful partnerships. The report is a comprehensive overview of the preferences of fund selectors, emphasizing the significance of these qualities in the decision-making process.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services Advises on the Sale of Valley GMC of Hastings and Valley Buick GMC of Apple Valley in Minnesota from Valley Automotive Group to Kunes Auto Group
data.description: California-based Performance Brokerage Services, a prominent player in dealership transactions, recently facilitated the sale of two Minnesota-based dealerships. Valley GMC of Hastings and Valley Buick GMC of Apple Valley were successfully sold by Jim Paul of Valley Automotive Group to Kunes Auto Group. This transaction marks a significant move in the automotive industry, with a total of two dealerships changing ownership. The deal was finalized on March 31, 2026, in Irvine, California.

data.title: Storyblok Introduces FlowMotion to Turn Every Content Update Into an Automated Workflow
data.description: A recent report revealed that 75% of marketers waste one day per week managing content synchronization. FlowMotion is an innovative solution that streamlines cross-system activities within minutes, initiated by a single content prompt. The revolutionary CMS, FlowMotion, was launched by Storyblok in New York on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Club InterContinental Lounge, Featuring Views of Tokyo Bay, to Reopen April 1 Following Renovation: Refined Space Enveloped in Gentle Light and Sparkle of Tokyo Bay
data.description: InterContinental Tokyo Bay has recently enhanced its Club InterContinental experience by renovating the upper-floor guest rooms and lounge. The Club InterContinental Lounge, situated on the 20th floor, has been revamped to provide guests with an even more comfortable and luxurious stay. This renovation aims to cater to the increasing demand for premium accommodations and services. The improvements include upgraded facilities and amenities aimed at enhancing the overall guest experience. Visitors can now enjoy a higher level of comfort and sophistication during their stay at the hotel. The upgraded Club InterContinental Lounge and guest rooms reflect the commitment of InterContinental Tokyo Bay to offering top-notch services to its guests.

data.title: Qover marks 10 years with $12M in growth funding from CIBC
data.description: Celebrating its 10th anniversary, Qover, a prominent European company specializing in embedded insurance orchestration, has achieved a major feat by securing a $12 million growth capital injection from CIBC Innovation Banking. This extension of funds adds to the company's overall financial support, reaching a notable total funding milestone.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services Advises on the Sale of Eich Mazda & Eich Volkswagen in Saint Cloud, Minnesota from Linda Eich-Desjardins to Luther Automotive Group
data.description: A renowned dealership buy-sell specialist, Performance Brokerage Services, recently facilitated the sale of Eich Mazda & Eich Volkswagen in Saint Cloud, Minnesota. This historic dealership, the 7th oldest in the United States, was successfully transferred from Linda Eich-Desjardins to David Luther of Luther Automotive Group. The transaction marks a significant move in the automotive market and was overseen by the firm based in Irvine, California.

data.title: DNV SELECTED TO CERTIFY CLASS D DEVICES FOR LEADING U.S. MANUFACTURER UNDER EU IVDR
data.description: DNV is aiding the manufacturer in adapting to new regulations by utilizing its digital certification platform and providing clear project management. Located in OSLO, Norway, the company announced its support on March 31, 2026. As a designated Notified Body for the European Union's In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation (IVDR), DNV is helping ensure compliance with the new regulation effectively. This initiative aims to streamline the process and provide transparency, benefiting the manufacturer and contributing to a smoother transition during the implementation of the new regulations.

data.title: Covéa chooses Shift Technology as strategic partner for fraud and risk management
data.description: In an effort to combat fraud and financial crime more effectively, UK insurer Covéa has introduced a new integrated risk intelligence framework. This initiative, launched in London on March 31, 2026, aims to enhance fraud detection and streamline claims processes within the insurance industry. By consolidating various tools and approaches, Covéa seeks to optimize risk management practices throughout the insurance lifecycle. The framework promises to boost efficiency significantly and bolster the company's overall response to fraudulent activities.

data.title: Truecaller Crosses 500 Million Users: Sets a New Global Standard for Trusted Communication
data.description: Today, Truecaller revealed that it has exceeded 500 million monthly active users (MAU), marking a significant milestone for the company. In the past year alone, Truecaller has gained an impressive 50 million new users, bringing their total user base to over half a billion. Furthermore, the company has successfully expanded its reach outside of India, with over 150 million users now using the service globally. This growth demonstrates the widespread appeal and success of Truecaller in connecting users around the world.

data.title: Innocan Pharma Reports 2025 Financial Results, with Revenues at US $26.6M
data.description: Innocan Pharma Corporation, a pharmaceutical technology company based in Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, Alberta, shared exciting news on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTC: INNPF, is dedicated to creating advanced drug delivery platform technologies.

data.title: PROYA Showcases Multi-Brand Portfolio at Cosmoprof Worldwide Bologna
data.description: A Chinese cosmetics company, PROYA Cosmetics Co., Ltd., showcased its focus on science-driven products and commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives, as well as its adaptation to changing consumer preferences at the prestigious international beauty trade show held in BOLOGNA, Italy from March 26 to 28, 2026.

data.title: DOTT PUBLISHES Q4 AND FY 2025 FINANCIAL REPORT
data.description: In Amsterdam, on March 31, 2026, a recent report revealed significant achievements in financial performance. The company recorded a notable milestone with €7 million in Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal year 2025, marking its first instance of profitability. Notable improvements were seen in Q4, showcasing enhanced underlying economic factors and margins. Additionally, the positive trend continued into Q1 of 2026, with successful tender wins in various crucial cities. These wins amounted to a total of €85...

data.title: KuCoin settles with CFTC for $500K, ending case. Parent company pays fraction of $300M due to DOJ over similar charges.
data.description: The parent company of KuCoin has agreed to pay a settlement of $500,000 to address charges from the CFTC, which is significantly less than the $300 million settlement reached with the DOJ for comparable charges.
